h5: font-mono text-[11px] tracking-[0.18em] uppercase text-[var(--konde-ink-500)] m-0 mb-3.5 font-medium
link: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 py-1.5 text-[14px] text-[var(--konde-ink-700)] no-underline hover:text-[var(--konde-green)] transition-colors
meta: mt-14 pt-6 border-t border-[var(--konde-border)] flex justify-between items-center gap-6 flex-wrap
social-link: w-8 h-8 rounded-full inline-flex items-center justify-center text-[var(--konde-ink-500)] border border-[var(--konde-border)] bg-[var(--konde-surface)] no-underline hover:text-[var(--konde-ink-900)] hover:border-[var(--konde-ink-900)] transition-colors
